plugins.name: create-team
plugins.description: Creates and manages an agent team (planner + implementer teammates) for the current worktree session.
plugins.author: Stefan Cho
plugins.installCommand: npx skills@latest add devstefancho/claude-plugins --skill create-team -a claude-code -y

plugins.name: split-work
plugins.description: Splits current project work into parallel-safe task groups with worktree branch names and structured starting prompts. Use only on manual /split-work invocation — no automatic trigger.
plugins.author: Stefan Cho
plugins.installCommand: npx skills@latest add devstefancho/claude-plugins --skill split-work -a claude-code -y

plugins.name: browser-walkthrough
plugins.description: Interactive headed-browser walkthrough with playwright-cli — attaches to the user's browser and advances one step per user confirmation, with explicit keyword gates for irreversible actions like final submit or payment. Use for iframe-heavy Korean sites (홈택스, 정부24, 은행, 쇼핑몰) done together with the user, or when the user says 브라우저 보면서 같이 진행, headed 모드로 같이, 단계별로 진행해줘, 홈택스 같이, 정부24 같이, 한 스텝씩, 한 단계씩 진행, walkthrough 모드, or step-by-step browser.
plugins.author: Stefan Cho
plugins.installCommand: npx skills@latest add devstefancho/claude-plugins --skill browser-walkthrough -a claude-code -y

plugins.name: computer-use-test
plugins.description: Runs app test scenarios through Computer Use MCP and produces a structured UI/UX feedback report with screenshot evidence.
plugins.author: Stefan Cho
plugins.installCommand: npx skills@latest add devstefancho/claude-plugins --skill computer-use-test -a claude-code -y

plugins.name: ui-prototype-preview
plugins.description: Generates a distinctive standalone HTML preview from a saved UI brainstorm idea.
plugins.author: Stefan Cho
plugins.installCommand: npx skills@latest add devstefancho/claude-plugins --skill ui-prototype-preview -a claude-code -y

plugins.name: hermes-runtime
plugins.description: Talk to and control the Hermes companion runtime — chat, run async tasks, check status, manage cron jobs, configure the connection. Use for /hermes, "hermes chat", "hermes run", "hermes status", "hermes jobs", "hermes setup", or 헤르메스 채팅/실행/상태/잡/설정.
plugins.author: Stefan Cho
plugins.installCommand: npx skills@latest add devstefancho/claude-plugins --skill hermes-runtime -a claude-code -y

plugins.name: setup-notification
plugins.description: Install macOS TTS + dialog notifications for Claude Code Stop and Notification events — a voice cue and a clickable dialog when Claude finishes a task or needs permission/input.
plugins.author: Stefan Cho
plugins.installCommand: npx skills@latest add devstefancho/claude-plugins --skill setup-notification -a claude-code -y

plugins.name: brain-storm
plugins.description: Brainstorms grounded feature ideas from the current codebase and saves them as wireframed notes in `brain-storm/` — the ideation step before writing specs.
plugins.author: Stefan Cho
plugins.installCommand: npx skills@latest add devstefancho/claude-plugins --skill brain-storm -a claude-code -y

plugins.name: llm-wiki
plugins.description: Maintains an LLM-powered 3-layer personal wiki (raw → wiki → schema) from raw sources.
plugins.author: Stefan Cho
plugins.installCommand: npx skills@latest add devstefancho/claude-plugins --skill llm-wiki -a claude-code -y

plugins.name: session-resume
plugins.description: Locates a previous Claude Code or Codex CLI session's JSONL transcript and prints the last N turns plus metadata so work can continue.
plugins.author: Stefan Cho
plugins.installCommand: npx skills@latest add devstefancho/claude-plugins --skill session-resume -a claude-code -y

plugins.name: implement-with-test
plugins.description: Implements a task as production code plus tests, auto-detecting the test framework (jest, vitest, pytest, go test, cargo test) and following existing project patterns. Task information comes from an argument (description or task file path) or the current conversation.
plugins.author: Stefan Cho
plugins.installCommand: npx skills@latest add devstefancho/claude-plugins --skill implement-with-test -a claude-code -y

plugins.name: test-commit-push-pr-clean
plugins.description: Runs a branch-safe finish workflow that lints, tests, commits, pushes, creates a pull request, and cleans merged worktrees.
plugins.author: Stefan Cho
plugins.installCommand: npx skills@latest add devstefancho/claude-plugins --skill test-commit-push-pr-clean -a claude-code -y

plugins.name: writing-flows
plugins.description: Writes single-scenario Flow documents under flows/<topic>/ — use case context, one Mermaid diagram (sequence or flowchart), step-by-step branches, and source file references — so how a service behaves end-to-end can be grasped at a glance.
plugins.author: Stefan Cho
plugins.installCommand: npx skills@latest add devstefancho/claude-plugins --skill writing-flows -a claude-code -y

plugins.name: writing-specs
plugins.description: Writes and manages spec files in specs/ with mandatory duplicate search, conflict detection, and a structured final report.
plugins.author: Stefan Cho
plugins.installCommand: npx skills@latest add devstefancho/claude-plugins --skill writing-specs -a claude-code -y

plugins.name: writing-tasks
plugins.description: Decomposes specs into persistent task files under tasks/ with a dependency graph, parallel lane suggestions, and dynamically derived progress.
plugins.author: Stefan Cho
plugins.installCommand: npx skills@latest add devstefancho/claude-plugins --skill writing-tasks -a claude-code -y
